name: Fortress Halcyon
narrative: Concentrate in the port district; battery active as area denial; FACs held as port screen; little or no mining. The strait stays physically clear; the fight is at the waterline.

name: Strait Denial
narrative: Mine Halcyon Strait early and deep; FAC harassment of sweep operations; cede the town, deny the port's use. The strait is the battlefield; MCM under attack.

name: Spoiling Withdrawal
narrative: Demolish port cranes and the causeway; withdraw the garrison to Carrick; harass with FACs. Infrastructure destruction.

name: Spoiling Withdrawal — mining branch
narrative: R3 with remaining mine stocks laid in both approaches during withdrawal. The commitment-breaker: under R3m no plan satisfies all of C2–C4 (vignette §6, thesis B).
